steps.title: Use the even though signal
steps.content: The phrase even though calls for a fact that seems to work against the global increase in mined copper. The completion should point to a decline somewhere in the table, not another increase.

steps.title: Choose the contrasting fact
steps.content: The table shows that the United States mined less copper in 2020 than in 1995, even as the global total increased. A misstates the 1995 data, while C and D describe facts that support or do not challenge the global rise. The answer is B.
